hero.titleBefore: All your money in one place with
hero.description: Track expenses, budgets, recurring bills, and investments (stocks & crypto) with clear insights and real-time prices.

features.heading: Everything you need to manage money—beautifully
features.description: From daily spending to long-term investing, stay in control with one simple app.

items.title: Recurring bills & subscriptions
items.desc: Never miss a payment with automatic tracking and reminders.

items.title: Investment tracking
items.desc: Monitor stocks and crypto with live prices and performance.

items.title: Net worth & accounts
items.desc: A unified view across cash, cards, brokerage, and wallets.

items.title: Smart budgeting
items.desc: Monthly limits, rollover rules, and category targets that guide decisions.

items.title: Auto-categorization
items.desc: Rules and suggestions that get smarter over time.

items.title: Multi-currency
items.desc: Track accounts across currencies with automatic conversions.

items.title: Secure & private
items.desc: Your data stays yours. Export anytime.

cta.heading: Ready to take control of your money?
cta.description: Simple setup, instant clarity, and one place for everything—spending, bills, and investments.

steps.title: Connect or import
steps.desc: Link banks/brokerages where available, or import CSVs and crypto wallets.

steps.title: Categorize & set goals
steps.desc: Automatic suggestions, custom categories, and monthly targets.

steps.title: Track & grow
steps.desc: Stay on budget, monitor investments, and optimize.

items.a: Yes. You can start on the Free plan and upgrade anytime.

items.q: Do you support bank and brokerage connections?
items.a: In select regions. Otherwise you can import CSVs and add transactions manually.

items.q: How are stock and crypto prices updated?
items.a: We fetch regular price updates from reliable market data providers.

items.q: How do you handle security and privacy?
items.a: We follow industry best practices. Your data is encrypted and exportable anytime.
